title: Public Transport Assistance
opening: Hi there! How can I help you navigate our public transport system today?

t1.prompt: Hi there! How can I help you navigate our public transport system today?
t1.promptTranslation: Hi there! How can I help you navigate our public transport system today?

t2.prompt: Certainly. Which destination are you headed for, or which bus or train line are you interested in? Knowing that will help me guide you to the right platform or stop.
t2.promptTranslation: Certainly. Which destination are you headed for, or which bus or train line are you interested in? Knowing that will help me guide you to the right platform or stop.

t2a_info.prompt: Okay, for the City Centre, you'll need the Line 3 Metro from platform 4. A single journey is £2.80. Are you planning any transfers or concerned about peak hours?
t2a_info.promptTranslation: Okay, for the City Centre, you'll need the Line 3 Metro from platform 4. A single journey is £2.80. Are you planning any transfers or concerned about peak hours?

t2b_transfer.prompt: Right, transfers can be a bit tricky. Which line are you starting from, and where do you need to go? I can help you figure out the best connection, bearing in mind any potential disruptions.
t2b_transfer.promptTranslation: Right, transfers can be a bit tricky. Which line are you starting from, and where do you need to go? I can help you figure out the best connection, bearing in mind any potential disruptions.

t3.prompt: Right, are you looking for a single journey ticket, a day pass for unlimited travel, or perhaps a longer-term commuter pass? Each has its own benefits depending on your travel needs.
t3.promptTranslation: Right, are you looking for a single journey ticket, a day pass for unlimited travel, or perhaps a longer-term commuter pass? Each has its own benefits depending on your travel needs.

t4.prompt: Okay, I've checked for you. There are currently minor delays on Line 3 due to unexpected maintenance, so allow an extra 10-15 minutes. A day pass is indeed your best value for multiple trips today. Is there anything else I can assist you with regarding your journey, or are you ready to go?
t4.promptTranslation: Okay, I've checked for you. There are currently minor delays on Line 3 due to unexpected maintenance, so allow an extra 10-15 minutes. A day pass is indeed your best value for multiple trips today. Is there anything else I can assist you with regarding your journey, or are you ready to go?

t4_followup.prompt: We have digital maps available at the information desk, and schedules are posted at each stop and online. Remember to validate your ticket before boarding! Anything else?
t4_followup.promptTranslation: We have digital maps available at the information desk, and schedules are posted at each stop and online. Remember to validate your ticket before boarding! Anything else?

t-repeat.prompt: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat or rephrase your question?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat or rephrase your question?

t-end.prompt: Alright, safe travels then! Have a good day.
t-end.promptTranslation: Alright, safe travels then! Have a good day.
